rationale.R1.4: The agent positions the work against three lines of prior work and identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta by mapping against the nearest 3-5 works.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
